questions.question: A hiker is making trail mix with $6x + 12$ ounces of nuts and $9x + 18$ ounces of dried fruit. What is the greatest common factor of these two expressions?
A wildlife reserve has $15x - 30$ animals in one area and $25x - 50$ animals in another area. What is the greatest common factor of these two expressions?
A car is traveling $24x + 48$ miles per hour and using $16x + 32$ gallons of fuel per hour. What is the greatest common factor of these two expressions?
A group of friends want to hike $18x - 36$ feet uphill and $22x - 44$ feet downhill. What is the greatest common factor of these two expressions?
A park ranger is monitoring $12x + 24$ bird species in one area and $15x + 30$ bird species in another area. What is the greatest common factor of these two expressions?
A hiking group is consuming $8x + 16$ liters of water per hour and $12x + 24$ calories per hour. What is the greatest common factor of these two expressions?
A nature reserve has $20x - 40$ acres of forest and $25x - 50$ acres of grassland. What is the greatest common factor of these two expressions?
A group of hikers want to travel $30x + 60$ miles and use $20x + 40$ gallons of fuel. What is the greatest common factor of these two expressions?
Simplify the expression $12x^2 + 24x + 36$ by factoring out the greatest common factor. Show all steps and explain your reasoning.
Factor out the greatest common factor from the expression $15x^3 - 30x^2 + 45x$. Then, simplify the resulting expression and explain the process.

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Emphasize the importance of identifying the greatest common factor in each expression.
Tip 2: Encourage students to use the distributive property to simplify expressions after factoring.
